description_long: This object consists of six chocolate muffins arranged in two rows on a rectangular wooden tray. Each muffin is generously coated with a dense layer of chocolate sprinkles, giving the surface a rough, textured appearance. The muffins are individually wrapped in plain, light brown paper wrappers that slightly flare at the top. The chocolate coating appears thick and slightly glossy, with the sprinkles providing a matte contrast. The wooden tray has a smooth, polished finish with visible wood grain and rounded edges. The overall presentation suggests a fresh, bakery-style display suitable for a café or street food vendor.
description: Six chocolate muffins with chocolate sprinkles sit on a polished wooden tray, each wrapped in plain brown paper. The muffins have a rough, textured surface from the dense chocolate sprinkles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six muffins in two rows, highlighting the chocolate sprinkles and the plain brown wrappers.
description_view_1: Side view with the muffins aligned in two columns, emphasizing the depth and arrangement on the wooden tray.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the muffins and the wooden tray, with the sprinkles and wrappers still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the alignment and spacing of the muffins on the tray.
